episodes.title: Soviet propaganda: Posters, Cinema, Textbooks, the Cult of Heroes, the Language of the Press
episodes.description:
Beginner Level | Taught in English | Created by a PhD Researcher
Soviet propaganda was one of the most comprehensive systems of mass persuasion in the twentieth century. It was not limited to political slogans or censorship. Rather, it shaped everyday life through visual culture, education, cinema, newspapers, literature, and public rituals. 
If you would like to learn about the life in Soviet Union more, I strongly encourage you to purchase my online educational course on the history of the USSR. https://www.udemy.com/course/history-of-soviet-russian-english/?referralCode=F659005269F786945F5F
